overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student character in a robe exploring a vast historic library with Gothic stone architecture and towering bookshelves, transitioning to a static scene of students studying in a reading room with a fireplace and large windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand library hall with towering bookshelves and reading tables

agents.ego_description: student in dark robe walking steadily through the library past wooden reading tables and stone columns

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling dark wooden bookshelves filled with books lining the left side
floor-to-ceiling dark wooden bookshelves filled with books lining the right side
long wooden tables with attached benches for studying
polished stone tile flooring with geometric patterns
large antique celestial globe on ornate wooden stand
tall stone archways and columns supporting the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast historic library with towering wooden bookshelves on both sides and stone tile floors. Long wooden reading tables line the central aisle, and a large celestial globe sits on a stand near the stone columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy library reading room with fireplace and leather armchairs

events.description: camera cuts to static view of reading room with students studying near the fireplace
UI overlay appears in bottom right displaying 11:30am Self Study

agents.ego_description: seated in leather armchair with back to camera, quietly observing the reading room

notable_agents.action: student sitting in armchair reading a book near the stone fireplace

entered.detail: green leather armchair with high back facing the fireplace
decorative rug under the globe and seating area
tall arched windows letting in natural light

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a static view of a cozy reading room with wooden floors and a stone fireplace. Two students sit in leather armchairs, one in the foreground with their back to the camera and another reading near the fire. A UI overlay indicates it is 11:30am Self Study time.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement from the grand scale of a historic library into the intimate atmosphere of a cozy reading room. It begins by gliding through a vast hall featuring towering wooden bookshelves and stone tile floors, passing long reading tables and a large celestial globe positioned near stone columns. As the camera moves forward, the expansive architecture shifts into a smaller, warm interior with wooden floors and a glowing stone fireplace. The scene finally settles into a static view of two students relaxing in leather armchairs during a self-study period, with a UI overlay marking the time as 11:30am.
